title: DIGITAL MARKETING EXECUTIVE
description:
Responsibilities including but not limited to:

  • Social Media/Digital Marketing: create & monitor content for several platforms at once
  • Provide strategy on delivering content to the right audience on the right channels (Facebook/Instagram/Google/TikTok)
  • Follow brand guidelines to execute a wide variety of activities that involve branding, advertising, social media, partnerships and more
  • Create and design promotional material including posters, brochures, advertisements and other types of print and online media
  • Plan and develop integrated marketing strategies to increase lead generation and drive brand awareness, engagement and conversion. Frequently encompassing both digital and offline media
  • Brainstorm, plan strategies and execute innovative social media campaigns for multiple platforms according to brand guidelines
  • Coordinate and assist in any photography or videography needed in the execution of marketing campaigns and social media content

Requirements:

  • Degree / Professional Qualification in Marketing, Business, Communication Design, Video or related discipline
  • Minimum of 1- 2 years of relevant experience working in relevant field
  • Creating and publishing creative content for multiple platforms should be second nature to you (Facebook, IG, Youtube, Tiktok, Google)
  • Experienced with Facebook Ads Manager or Google Ads
  • Basic design and image editing skills
  • Very meticulous, organised and digitally savvy.
  • Works well in both team and individual settings
  • Strong command of language, written and spoken
  • Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, Lightroom
  • Big pluses for Video editing knowledge / experience in Hubspot / SEO article writing

postedCompany.description:
OCD Hands Pte. Ltd. was incorporated in 2019. We are NEA-registered Cleaning Business (NEA200314/0049D/N01).


OCD Hands Pte. Ltd. (UEN 201910049D is a company that provides part-time cleaning services and is licensed by the NEA, which means our clients can depend on both an efficient and well-done service provided by cleaners. The services that we provide are dishwashing and cleaning for both commercial and residential needs. OCD Hands strives to build positive relationships with our clients to ensure communication and to build a good connection with the companies to which we provide our services.

Additionally, we supply manpower for multiple scenarios including; stewards for  events, hotel housekeeping, and public area attendants. In keeping with our  cleaning solutions mantra, we are also dedicated to demonstrating efficient and  high-quality services which will be in keeping with a client's individual needs and beliefs.
postedCompany.name: OCD HANDS PTE. LTD.
